title: Unbreakable Blocks
description: Unbreakable blocks equivalent of vanilla Minecraft's blocks.
body:
### **⏳ Work In Progress ⏳** Progress bar : 🟩🟩🟩🟩🟥🟥🟥🟥 Over 420/834 blocks done - full list [here](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/17aLMODWaF8AFjOxiM7HxvLMbO_nXyD6U5FddSVIM03g/edit?usp=sharing) (hosted by Google Drive not by Modrinth) [**👾 Report bugs here 👾**](https://forms.gle/ayatGM3jhC9g7fFq8) **What is it ?** Introducing the "Unbreakable Blocks Mod" for Minecraft! With this mod, admins can fortify their worlds against players by transforming blocks into unbreakable structures. From natural elements to building materials, and with easy conversion using Brush Converter Tools, this mod provides unparalleled durability. Build with confidence and maintain control over your world in Minecraft. The "Unbreakable Blocks Mod" has been designed with RolePlay servers in mind, offering players the freedom to build without the risk of destroying the environment. Inspired by the concept of DarkRP from Garry's Mod, this mod ensures that while players can create detailed structures for their roleplay scenarios, the integrity of the map remains intact. This allows server admins to maintain a persistent and immersive world, where construction is possible, but destruction is limited, enhancing long-term gameplay and world-building. For **Admins/Builders only** : You should use the ressource pack "[Unbreakable Blocks Viewer](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unbreakable-blocks-viewer/)" to see wich blocks are unbreakble and which are not. [Download here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unbreakable-blocks-viewer/)

**Questions & Answers** > **Q :** Why so much blocks are missing ?
> **A :** This mod is still in developpment, be patient. I add as many blocks i can, but remember some ultra rare devs have a life on side (Obviously talking about playing R6S/RL). > **Q :** I don't see the unbreakble blocks like on the screenshots galery.
> **A :** If you want to see the unbreakable blocks you have to download the ressource pack made for this. [Download here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/unbreakable-blocks-viewer/)
**Unbreakable blocks list :** [Google Sheets (hosted by Google Drive not by Modrinth)](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/17aLMODWaF8AFjOxiM7HxvLMbO_nXyD6U5FddSVIM03g/edit?usp=sharing) **Items list :**
Brush convert vanilla block to unbreakable block - Brush Converter Tool Size 1 (To Unbreakable)
- Brush Converter Tool Size 6 (To Unbreakable)

Brush are active on 50 blocks range around the player.
Brush convert unbreakable block to vanilla block - Brush Converter Tool Size 1 (To Normal)
- Brush Converter Tool Size 6 (To Normal)

Brush are active on 50 blocks range around the player.
[**👾 Report bugs here 👾**](https://forms.gle/ayatGM3jhC9g7fFq8)
